ACKNOWLEDGMENT SECTION

I, _______________________________ (Employee Name), acknowledge that I have received, read, and understood the contents of this memorandum dated {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.memo_date, "dd MMM yyyy") if doc.memo_date else "__________" }} regarding {{ doc.subject or "___________________________" }}.

I understand the instructions/policies outlined in this memorandum and agree to comply with all requirements mentioned herein.

Department: _______________________
